name: PI-RADS (Prostate Imaging Reporting and Data System)
description: PI-RADS v2.1 classification template for prostate MRI assessment

rads.assessment: Clinically significant cancer is likely to be present

findings.technique: Multiparametric prostate MRI performed at [X]T including T2-weighted, DWI (b-values: 50, 500, 1000, 2000), and dynamic contrast-enhanced sequences. PI-RADS v2.1 scoring applied.
findings.comparison: Comparison made with [prior MRI / prior biopsy] from [date].

sections.name: T2-Weighted
sections.content: Peripheral zone: [homogeneous intermediate signal / focal hypointense area] in [location]. [Transition zone:nodular BPH / focal abnormality] identified.

sections.name: DWI
sections.content: DWI demonstrates [focal restricted diffusion / ADC map shows focal low signal] in [location] measuring [X]mm. Maximum b2000 signal: [high/intermediate/low].

sections.name: DCE
sections.content: Dynamic contrast-enhanced: [focal early enhancement / no focal enhancement / negative] in [location]. [Positive / Negative] for extracapsular extension.

sections.name: Peripheral Zone Score
sections.content: PI-RADS score for peripheral zone lesion: [1-5]. DWI contributes [X] points.

sections.name: Transition Zone Score
sections.content: PI-RADS score for transition zone lesion: [1-5]. T2W contributes [X] points.

sections.name: ECE Assessment
sections.content: Extracapsular extension: [Present / Absent / Indeterminate]. Neurovascular bundle: [involved / not involved].

impression:
1. PI-RADS [X]: [category description]
2. [Dominant lesion location] with [size] measurement
3. [ECE: present/absent]. [Seminal vesicle invasion: present/absent]. [Lymph nodes: abnormal/normal].
4. Targeted biopsy to [location] recommended.
5. Overall assessment: [clinical significance and recommendations]
author: RadReport Templates
